# Best Soil for Container Plants

Good soil matters in pots.

## Why garden soil fails in containers

Garden soil compacts in pots, suffocating roots and blocking drainage. Container plants need a mix that stays airy.

## What to look for in a potting mix

Choose a mix with peat or coco coir for moisture, perlite for drainage, and compost for nutrients. Avoid mixes with added fertilizer if you grow herbs.

## Refreshing old potting soil

Replace or amend potting mix every season. Roots deplete structure and nutrients within a single growing year.
